channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. military strikes another suspected drug boat in eastern Pacific, killing 2
item.description: The U.S. military reported striking another vessel suspected of drug trafficking in the eastern Pacific, resulting in two deaths, a day after a similar incident.

item.title: Two hikers describe their close call with grizzly bears
item.description: ABC News' Danny New interviews two Glacier National Park hikers who now find humor in their grizzly bear encounter.

item.title: Australia sues 3M for $1.4 billion over 'forever chemicals' at defense sites
item.description: Australia is taking legal action against 3M, seeking over 2 billion Australian dollars for contamination from firefighting foam.

item.title: Fire at Kenyan girls' school kills 16, injures many others
item.description: A fire at a school in central Kenya has resulted in fatalities, with search teams deployed to assess the situation.
